description: L-2000 series windows do not have an exterior color option
validationMessage: Exterior color is not available on L-2000 series windows.

action.reason: Exterior color option does not exist for L-2000 series

description: There is no single hung option in L-2000 series. Only the 03A0 model has single hung.
validationMessage: Single hung windows are not available in the L-2000 series. Use 03A0 for single hung.

action.reason: Single hung only available in 03A0 series

description: Full screen cannot be made on picture windows, 3-lite sliders, or arch-top windows
validationMessage: Full screen is not available on picture windows, 3-lite sliders, or arch-top windows.

action.reason: Full screen cannot be manufactured for these window types

description: Full screens come standard with any window with an exterior color. Half screens are not available on these units.
validationMessage: Windows with exterior color automatically include full screens. Half screens are not available on exterior color units.

description: Clay vinyl color cannot be made in L-2000 (FUSION) and 0700 series
validationMessage: Clay color is not available for L-2000 (FUSION) or 0700 series windows.

description: Interior color cannot be made in L-2000 (FUSION) series
validationMessage: Interior color is not available for L-2000 (FUSION) series windows.

action.reason: Interior color cannot be manufactured in L-2000 (FUSION) series

description: L-2000 series must have B1 CONTOURED grids
validationMessage: L-2000 series windows must use B1 CONTOURED grids.

description: All small sliders and small picture windows with UI 83 and below are charged at $285
validationMessage: Small sliders and picture windows (UI ≤83) are priced at $285.

description: Tapcon concrete attachment charge is $10 per unit for L200 series
validationMessage: Tapcon concrete attachment adds $10 per unit.

description: Vent stops are not available on 03A0 series
validationMessage: Vent stops are not available on 03A0 series windows.

action.reason: Vent stops not available on 03A0 series

description: Full screen cannot be made on picture windows, 3-lite sliders, or arch-top windows (03A0)
validationMessage: Full screen is not available on picture windows, 3-lite sliders, or arch-top windows in 03A0 series.

action.reason: Full screen cannot be manufactured for these window types in 03A0 series

description: Interior color cannot be made in 03A0 single hung or all arch-tops (S140, S144, S146)
validationMessage: Interior color is not available for 03A0 single hung or arch-top models (S140, S144, S146).

action.reason: Interior color not available on these models

description: Windows with exterior color must have B1 CONTOURED grids (03A0)
validationMessage: 03A0 series windows with exterior color must use B1 CONTOURED grids.

description: Diamond grids must be A1 FLAT (03A0)
validationMessage: Diamond grids must be A1 FLAT style in 03A0 series.

description: All single hung windows (03A0) must be written in the specialty windows section of the contract. Cannot be combined with double hung windows on the double hung line.
validationMessage: 03A0 single hung windows must be entered in the specialty windows section of the contract, not on the double hung line.

description: All small sliders and small picture windows with UI 83 and below are charged at $285 (03A0)
validationMessage: Small sliders and picture windows (UI ≤83) in 03A0 series are priced at $285.

description: Rain glass is not available on 03A0 series
validationMessage: Rain glass is not available on 03A0 series windows.

action.reason: Rain glass not available on 03A0 series

description: Tapcon concrete attachment charge is $10 per unit for 03A0 series
validationMessage: Tapcon concrete attachment adds $10 per unit.

description: 50" maximum oriel on double hung windows
validationMessage: Maximum oriel on double hung windows is 50 inches.

action.reason: Oriel exceeds 50" maximum for double hung windows

description: Oriel greater than 50" can only be made on single hung windows (03A0)
validationMessage: Oriel measurements over 50" are only available on single hung windows (03A0).

description: Oriel is measured from top of glass to top of meeting rail
validationMessage: Oriel must be measured from the top of the glass to the top of the meeting rail.

description: Full screen cannot be made on picture windows, 3-lite sliders, or arch-top windows (3000 series)
validationMessage: Full screen is not available on picture windows, 3-lite sliders, or arch-top windows in 3000 series.

action.reason: Full screen cannot be manufactured for these window types in 3000 series

description: Windows with exterior color must have B1 CONTOURED grids (3000 series)
validationMessage: 3000 series windows with exterior color must use B1 CONTOURED grids.

description: Diamond grids must be A1 FLAT (3000 series)
validationMessage: Diamond grids must be A1 FLAT style in 3000 series.

description: All small sliders and small picture windows with UI 83 and below are charged at $285 (3000 series)
validationMessage: Small sliders and picture windows (UI ≤83) in 3000 series are priced at $285.

description: Tapcon concrete attachment charge is $10 per unit for 3000 series
validationMessage: Tapcon concrete attachment adds $10 per unit.

sourceSection: Wincore Black on Black Rules and Exceptions
description: $100 adder for non-special-shape Wincore windows with UI of 120 or larger
validationMessage: A $100 large window adder applies to Wincore Black on Black windows with UI ≥120.

sourceSection: Wincore Black on Black Special Shape Rules and Exceptions
description: Wincore Black on Black special shape windows are priced from the non-impact pricing sheet and cannot be discounted
validationMessage: Wincore Black on Black special shape windows must be priced from the non-impact pricing sheet and cannot be discounted.

sourceSection: Wincore Black on Black Rules and Exceptions
description: SDL grids on Wincore Black on Black are priced at $60 per lite
validationMessage: SDL grids on Wincore Black on Black windows are $60 per lite.

sourceSection: Wincore Black on Black Rules and Exceptions
description: Single charge per window/SGD for both inside and outside black color on Wincore
validationMessage: There is a single charge per window or sliding patio door for both inside and outside black on Wincore.

sourceSection: Wincore Black on Black Rules and Exceptions
description: Tapcon concrete attachment charge is $10 per unit for Wincore Black on Black
validationMessage: Tapcon concrete attachment adds $10 per unit.

sourceSection: Awning Series Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: New construction awning frame changes to 0151 instead of 0951
validationMessage: New construction awning windows use model 0151 instead of 0951.

sourceSection: Awning Series Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Tapcon concrete attachment charge is $10 per unit for awning windows
validationMessage: Tapcon concrete attachment adds $10 per unit.

sourceSection: Casement Series Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Any mull of two 0971 casement windows fitting within 32-72" width and 19-79" height (max UI 150) must be ordered as 0972 double casement
validationMessage: Two mulled 0971 casement windows within 32-72"W × 19-79"H (max UI 150) must be ordered as a single 0972 double casement.

sourceSection: Casement Series Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: New construction casement frame changes to 0171 instead of 0971
validationMessage: New construction casement windows use model 0171 instead of 0971.

sourceSection: Casement Series Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Tapcon concrete attachment charge is $10 per unit for casement windows
validationMessage: Tapcon concrete attachment adds $10 per unit.

sourceSection: Garden Window Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Tapcon concrete attachment charge is $10 per unit for garden windows
validationMessage: Tapcon concrete attachment adds $10 per unit.

sourceSection: Special Shape Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Special shapes over max UI or with a dimension over 84" get full price of max UI plus $150 adder and do not qualify for 80% discount
validationMessage: Special shapes over max UI (or with a dimension over 84") must be charged at full price of max UI plus $150 adder. No 80% discount applies.

sourceSection: Special Shape Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Polygon shapes do NOT require special shape trim
validationMessage: Polygon special shapes do not require special shape trim (no bent trim piece).

sourceSection: Special Shape Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Radius shapes (arch windows) require special shape trim unless they have integrated nail fins
validationMessage: Radius/arch special shapes require special shape trim to be charged, unless the window has integrated nail fins.

sourceSection: Special Shape Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Special shapes under 24" wide should use a 0700 or casement frame
validationMessage: Special shapes under 24" wide should use a 0700 or casement frame.

sourceSection: Special Shape Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Nail fins on special shapes are charged by the pricing page, not the contract price of $10
validationMessage: Nail fins on special shapes must be priced from the pricing page, not the standard $10 contract price.

sourceSection: Special Shape Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Special shape trim cannot be discounted
validationMessage: Special shape trim cannot be discounted. It must be charged at full price.

sourceSection: Special Shape Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Trim must be added on all special shapes (with polygon exception per BTR-2026-039)
validationMessage: Trim must be added on all special shape windows. Exception: polygon shapes do not require special shape trim.

sourceSection: Special Shape Pricing Rules and Exceptions
description: Tapcon concrete attachment charge is $10 per unit for special shapes
validationMessage: Tapcon concrete attachment adds $10 per unit.

sourceSection: SDL Window Grid Rules and Exceptions
description: SDL grids come in 7/8" or 1-1/4" options. Size must be stated on the order form.
validationMessage: SDL grid size (7/8" or 1-1/4") must be stated on the order form for correct pricing and ordering.

sourceSection: SDL Window Grid Rules and Exceptions
description: SDL grids are not written as A1 or B1 — they are their own style of grid
validationMessage: SDL grids should not be written as A1 or B1. They are their own style.

sourceSection: SDL Window Grid Rules and Exceptions
description: SDL grid pricing is determined by size (7/8" or 1-1/4"), window style/UI, location, and vertical line count
validationMessage: SDL grid pricing depends on: grid size, window style/UI, grid location (full/top/ends), and vertical line count.

description: SDL grids cannot be discounted on any window
validationMessage: SDL grids cannot be discounted on any window.

description: All SDL grids have a 10% commission
validationMessage: SDL grids carry a 10% commission.

description: SDL double check paper must be stapled to front of folder for any job with SDL grids
validationMessage: Jobs with SDL grids must have an SDL double check paper stapled to the front of the folder.

description: Tapcon concrete attachment charge is $10 per unit for SDL windows
validationMessage: Tapcon concrete attachment adds $10 per unit.

description: Operating direction must be provided on all sliding glass doors. They are not field reversible.
validationMessage: Operating direction (XO/OX/OXO) must be specified on all sliding glass doors. These are not field reversible.

description: XO notation is always from the outside looking in. X=operating panel, O=fixed panel.
validationMessage: XO notation is always from the outside looking in. X = operating panel, O = fixed panel.

description: 3" sash is standard (no charge), 5" sash and 7" (French) sash are charged per panel
validationMessage: 3" sash is standard (no charge). 5" and 7" (French) sash sizes are charged per panel.

description: Beige and Clay vinyl colors on SGD are charged separately per panel
validationMessage: Beige and Clay vinyl colors on sliding glass doors are charged separately per panel.

description: Exterior color on SGD carries $10 commission for the salesman, entered under designated contract line
validationMessage: Exterior color on sliding glass doors has a $10 commission. Enter in contract under the designated exterior color line.

description: Interior color on SGD goes under door options in a blank field with no commission
validationMessage: Interior color on sliding glass doors goes under door options with no commission.

description: Glass requirements by region: Dallas LEE required+included, Houston LEE required+charged, BTR choice of LE or LEE
validationMessage: Dallas: LEE required and included. Houston: LEE required and must be charged. Baton Rouge: choice of LE or LEE.

description: Standard colonial grids on SGD are charged per panel. Prairie grids must use pricing sheet.
validationMessage: Colonial grids on SGD are charged per panel on the contract. Prairie grids must be priced from the pricing sheet.

description: Internal mini blinds on SGD are available in 6'8" door height ONLY
validationMessage: Internal mini blinds are only available for 6'8" (80") height sliding glass doors.

action.reason: Internal mini blinds only available in 6'8" door height

description: Internal mini blinds on SGD are NOT available with exterior color
validationMessage: Internal mini blinds cannot be ordered with exterior color on sliding glass doors.

action.reason: Internal mini blinds not compatible with exterior color

description: Internal mini blinds on 6408 and 6422 are only available with 5" sash (rail)
validationMessage: Internal mini blinds on models 6408 and 6422 require a 5" sash (rail).

action.reason: Mini blinds on 6408/6422 only available with 5" sash

description: BBG ThermD LT (LE) internal blinds pricing - BTR only: 6405/6406/6408=$1361.25, 6409/6422=$2041.88, 6412=$2722.50
BBG ThermD LTSF (LEE) internal blinds pricing: 6405/6406/6408=$1694, 6409/6422=$2541, 6412=$3388
validationMessage: BBG ThermD LTSF (LEE) internal blinds: 6405/6406/6408 = $1694, 6409/6422 = $2541, 6412 = $3388. Required for Houston/Dallas, optional for BTR.

description: Vinyl patio door trim: qty 1 for 2-panel doors ≤6' width (6405, 6406, 6402), qty 2+ for 3+ panels or 6402 wider than 6'
validationMessage: Vinyl patio door trim: 1 trim for 2-panel doors ≤6' wide, 2+ trims for 3+ panel doors or 6402 over 6' wide.

description: No additional labor charges for trim, removals, or installation on SGD. Cutback floor is acceptable under MISC LABOR.
validationMessage: No additional labor charges for trim, removals, or installation on sliding glass doors. Cutback floor is acceptable on MISC LABOR line.

description: SGD removals must be entered as Window Removals, not on MISC LABOR line
validationMessage: Sliding glass door removals must be entered as Window Removals in contract entry, not on the MISC LABOR line.

description: Dallas region must add $130 per panel for Low-E on SGD
validationMessage: Dallas region: Add $130 per panel for Low-E on sliding glass doors.

description: Tapcon concrete attachment charge is $10 per unit for SGD
validationMessage: Tapcon concrete attachment adds $10 per unit.

description: Clay color cannot be made in L-2000 (FUSION) and 0700 series
validationMessage: Clay color is not available for L-2000 (FUSION) or 0700 series windows.

action.reason: Clay color cannot be manufactured in L-2000 or 0700 series

description: Exterior color cannot be made in L-2000 (FUSION), 0700 series, or clay vinyl windows
validationMessage: Exterior color is not available for L-2000 (FUSION), 0700 series, or windows with clay vinyl color.

action.reason: Exterior color not available on L-2000, 0700, or clay vinyl windows

description: Interior color cannot be made in L-2000 (FUSION), 03A0 single hung, or arch-tops (S140, S144, S146)
validationMessage: Interior color is not available for L-2000 (FUSION), 03A0 single hung, or arch-top models (S140, S144, S146).

action.reason: Interior color not available on these models

description: Windows with exterior color must have B1 CONTOURED grids (global rule)
validationMessage: All windows with exterior color must use B1 CONTOURED grids.

description: L-2000 series must have B1 CONTOURED grids (global color options rule)
validationMessage: L-2000 series windows must use B1 CONTOURED grids.

description: Diamond grids must be A1 FLAT (global color options rule)
validationMessage: Diamond grids must always be A1 FLAT style.

description: Trim is REQUIRED for inside-set windows. Exception: wood exterior.
validationMessage: Trim must be sold when windows are inside-set. Exception: windows in wood exterior do not require trim.

description: Trim can be discounted to $25 (unless in a windstorm area)
validationMessage: Trim can be discounted to $25 minimum (commission drops from $5 to $3). Not applicable in windstorm areas.

description: Trim must be either fully discounted or full price — no partial discounts allowed
validationMessage: Trim pricing must be either fully discounted or full price. Partial discounts are not permitted.

sourceSection: Audit Labor Requirement Memos - Header Flashing
description: Siding exterior likely needs header flashing. Question if missing but do not hold in audit.
validationMessage: Siding exterior jobs likely need header flashing. Question if not sold but do not hold the job in audit.

action.message: Confirm if header flashing is needed for siding exterior

sourceSection: Audit Labor Requirement Memos - Header Flashing
description: If header flashing sold for brick exterior, question why but do not hold in audit
validationMessage: Header flashing is unusual for brick exterior. Question why it was sold but do not hold the job in audit.

action.message: Question why header flashing was sold for brick exterior

sourceSection: Audit Labor Requirement Memos - Window Removals
description: Always ask if no charge for window removals, unless it is new construction or customer removes them
validationMessage: If no charge for window removals, verify why unless it's new construction or customer is removing windows.

action.message: Window removals shown but no charge on contract

sourceSection: Audit Labor Requirement Memos - Clear Story
description: Clear story: $225 minimum for first window + $75 each additional window
validationMessage: Clear story windows require $225 minimum for the first window and $75 for each additional window. Applies to mull units as well.

sourceSection: Audit Labor Requirement Memos - Clear Story
description: Exception: Small transom over front door not exceeding 8ft from ground uses $10 2nd floor charge instead of clear story pricing
validationMessage: Small transom windows over front doors that do not exceed 8ft from ground height use $10 second-floor charge instead of the clear story fee.

description: AC sash costs $90 per unit with 0% commission
validationMessage: AC sash is $90 with 0% commission. Entered under window options in Leads.

description: AC sash requires AC unit measurements on order form, F5 note in Windows Express, and Job Instructions note
validationMessage: AC sash orders require: AC unit measurements on order form, F5 note in Windows Express, and a Job Instructions note saying 'Please bring AC SASH for install'.

requirements.content: AC sash needed with AC measurements
Please bring AC SASH for install

description: Glass pack is priced the same as a small picture window per region
validationMessage: Glass pack is priced the same as a small picture window for the applicable region.

description: Glass packs require a remake form with specific fields filled in. Model is always 3004.
validationMessage: Glass packs require a remake form. Model must be 3004. Includes Sold-to/Ship-to, Date, Customer ID, Job name, Reason code 01, Assembly type GP, Tip-to-Tip Y, and measurements.

description: Special shape and temper pricing must be listed separately on the contract. Temper charge goes under specialty window options.
validationMessage: Special shape and temper pricing must be listed separately on the contract. Temper charge goes under 'specialty window options'. Combined pricing folders will be returned for correction.

description: Folders with combined special shape and temper pricing will be flagged and returned for correction
validationMessage: Pricing folders with combined special shape and temper pricing will be flagged and returned by the audit team for correction.

action.reason: Special shape and temper pricing must be separate

description: Tempering formula: Width (rounded up) × Height (rounded up) ÷ 144 = sq ft (round up to whole number)
validationMessage: Temper calculation: Width (rounded up) × Height (rounded up) ÷ 144 = sq ft (rounded up to whole number).

description: Bottom sash only (even split): divide the temper result by 2
validationMessage: For even-split windows needing only bottom sash tempered: divide the full temper calculation by 2.

action.note: Divide full window temper by 2 for even split

description: Bottom sash only (custom oriel): subtract oriel from height, use new height in formula
appliesTo: Double Hung windows with custom oriel
validationMessage: For custom oriel windows needing only bottom sash tempered: subtract oriel measurement from height and use the new height in the formula.

action.note: Subtract oriel from height to get bottom sash height

description: Bottom sash only (60/40 standard oriel): height × 0.40 = bottom sash height for tempering
validationMessage: For 60/40 standard oriel windows needing only bottom sash tempered: multiply overall height by 0.40 to get bottom sash height, then use in formula.

action.note: Use height × 0.40 for bottom sash height in 60/40 oriel

description: IRC R308.4.2: Glass within 24" of a door AND bottom edge less than 60" above floor requires tempering
validationMessage: Per IRC R308.4.2: Glass within 24" of either side of a door with bottom edge less than 60" above the floor must be tempered.

description: Tempering required when glass >9 sq ft AND bottom edge <18" above floor AND top edge >36" above floor AND walking surface within 36"
validationMessage: Tempering required when: glass pane is >9 sq ft, bottom edge is <18" above floor, top edge is >36" above floor, and a walking surface is within 36" of the window.

description: Glass adjacent to stairway/landing/ramp with bottom edge less than 36" above walking surface requires tempering
validationMessage: Glass adjacent to a stairway, landing, or ramp with bottom edge less than 36" above the walking surface must be tempered.

description: Full screens on L200 have pull tabs on the screen
validationMessage: Full screens on L200 series feature pull tabs.

description: Full screens come standard with any SGD with exterior color. Half screens not available on exterior color units.
validationMessage: Sliding glass doors with exterior color automatically include full screens. Half screens are not available.

sourceSection: Wincore Black on Black Pricing and Specifications
description: Wincore oriel measurement should be taken from the bottom of the window to the meeting rail
validationMessage: Wincore oriel measurement is taken from the bottom of the window to the meeting rail.

description: Exterior color cannot be combined with clay vinyl windows
validationMessage: Exterior color is not available on clay vinyl windows.

action.reason: Exterior color not compatible with clay vinyl
